request_text: Reset forgotten passwords from the login screen
Chart widgets for the operations dashboard
rationale: Clause 4.3 includes chart and widget components on the dashboard.

request_text: Hand the figures out as an Excel file people can open at home
rationale: Excel file hand-out = xlsx export, Clause 4.2.2.

request_text: Close every open session of a user with one click
rationale: Closing open sessions = session management, Clause 3.1.

request_text: Log in through the company's SAML identity provider
rationale: Clause 7.1 excludes SSO / third-party IdP (SAML) integration.

request_text: An app our reps can install from the App Store
rationale: An installable store app = mobile application development, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Dashboard numbers should tick upward live as data streams in
rationale: Dashboard vocabulary, but the deliverable is real-time streaming — excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Export audit trails of user actions for compliance reviews
rationale: No clause covers audit trails; wears 'export' vocabulary (4.2.2) but the deliverable is a new capability — change request.

request_text: Produce 12 standard reports a month for the regions
rationale: Clause 4.2.1 caps standard reports at 5 per month — change request.

request_text: Hook the HR platform up as another external system
rationale: Integrations are included (5.1) but the 24h pool has 14h consumed and the past integration analog is ~14h — cannot fit; also approaches the 2-integration limit. Change request.

request_text: Since yesterday the dashboard loads with an error banner
rationale: Defect in the delivered dashboard — bug-fix maintenance under Clause 8.1.
Turkish request: PDF export of reports — included by Clause 4.2.2.
